info.title: A fatal error was encountered. The library 'libhostpolicy.so' required to execute the application was not found in '/usr/share/dotnet'.
info.description:

- If this should be a framework-dependent app, add the '/tmp/inspectra-help-metu.core-2025.805.1.1-280ecfc18f984a6c9a58349aae794889/tool/.store/metu.core/2025.805.1.1/metu.core/2025.805.1.1/tools/net8.0/any/METU.CORE.runtimeconfig.json' file and specify the appropriate framework.
